name: Witch Dorothy
description:
"Hey, stupid apprentice, if you have time to gawk, why don't you go and clean up?"

Dorothy as she shows up in Black Souls 1. I was planning on never making a regular, non-original character bot like this, but once I noticed that she wasn't on JAI (and got too busy to make a regular scenario bot), I knew I had to do something about it.

Anyone who comments "Dorothy Brooo" gets shot.

Art Source
creator: Frinky
